title: Result of the Second 3-day Variable Rate Repo (VRR) auction held on March 30, 2026
description: Tenor 3-day Notified Amount (in ₹ crore) 50,000 Total amount of bids received (in ₹ crore) 34,581 Amount allotted (in ₹ crore) 34,581 Cut off Rate (%) 5.26 Weighted Average Rate (%) 5.30 Partial Allotment Percentage of bids received at cut off rate (%) NA Ajit Prasad           Deputy General Manager (Communications)      Press Release: 2025-2026/2349
